---
title: "About This Project"
---

<!-- TODO: Customize for uvmecon-ai context -->

## Why This Exists

<!-- Placeholder: describe the purpose of uvmecon-ai and how it differs from or extends teaching-ai -->

## Who It's For

**Students**: UVM Economics students across courses. Examples assume comfort with economic reasoning and academic writing.

**Instructors**: UVM Economics faculty who want to incorporate AI literacy into existing courses without building everything from scratch.

## UVM Context

The University of Vermont provides enterprise-protected [Microsoft Copilot](https://go.uvm.edu/copilot) to all students, faculty, and staff. Some modules reference this tool, but all concepts apply to any LLM.

## Contact

[Emily Beam](https://eabeam.github.io) · Department of Economics · University of Vermont · emily.beam@uvm.edu

## License

Licensed [CC-BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) — use freely with attribution.
